headline: Tesla (TSLA) Lands $9 Billion In Megapack Orders And Expands Home Energy Push

headline: Tesla's Stock Could Command a 20-30% Premium in a SpaceX Merger, Analysts Say — But Major Obstacles Remain
summary: A merger between Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (NASDAQ:SPCX) and Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is possible, but significant hurdles stand in the way, say analysts. RBC’s Tom Narayan said an all-stock acquisition is the most likely structure, citing operational synergies in AI training, Tesla’s Megapack energy-storage systems, and the Terafab chip project. He estimated Tesla could “potentially” receive a 20%–30% takeover premium and raised his Tesla price target to $500 from $475, considering t

headline: Tesla’s New Car Might Give Sales a Boost. Why It Isn’t Boosting the Stock.
summary: Tesla  produced a new version of its Model Y crossover.  Tesla stock was down 1.1% in premarket trading at $396.61, while  and  futures were down 0.6% and 0.9%, respectively.  The stock is down despite Tesla starting production of the three-row, six-seat version of its Model Y, called the Model Y L, with L for long wheelbase.

headline: Elon Musk loses $50 billion in a single day; SpaceX moves bitcoin
summary: SpaceX shares fell over 6% and Tesla dropped nearly 4% on Tuesday, wiping more than $50 billion off Elon Musk's net worth and pushing him below the $1 trillion mark. Meanwhile, SpaceX's bitcoin wallet — holding 18,712 BTC — made its first transaction in six months. CoinDesk's Jennifer Sanasie hosts "CoinDesk Daily."

content.title: Elon Musk loses $50 billion in a single day; SpaceX moves bitcoin
content.description: SpaceX shares fell over 6% and Tesla dropped nearly 4% on Tuesday, wiping more than $50 billion off Elon Musk's net worth and pushing him below the $1 trillion mark. Meanwhile, SpaceX's bitcoin wallet — holding 18,712 BTC — made its first transaction in six months. CoinDesk's Jennifer Sanasie hosts "CoinDesk Daily."
